source_intent.raw_intent: Case 026: I am a healthcare_admin in South Asia. Build a lovable_build_prompt for content_system using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is schema_blur. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build a content system for a healthcare administration entity in South Asia that can ingest, validate, and serve structured medical content despite schema_blur inputs (missing fields, inconsistent types, partial constraints). The system must enforce explicit validation gates at ingestion, transformation, and output stages. Scope: - The system shall accept raw content payloads with ambiguous or missing schema fields, apply configurable validation rules (required fields, type checks, range constraints), and produce a normalized output record. It must log all validation failures and provide a pass/fail summary per record. The system shall be deployable on Codex runtime with SR8 governance. Constraints: - All validation rules must be defined in a separate configuration file (JSON or YAML) and loaded at startup. - No external AI/ML inference calls; all validation must be rule-based. - The system must handle at least 1000 records per minute with <500ms latency per record. - All output records must include a 'validation_status' field (PASS/FAIL) and a 'validation_errors' array. - The system must not store or transmit any personally identifiable information (PII) beyond the input payload. - The system must be auditable: every validation decision must be logged with timestamp, rule ID, and input value. Success Criteria: - Given a payload with missing 'patient_id' field, the system returns FAIL with error 'missing_required_field: patient_id'. - Given a payload with 'age' as string 'thirty', the system returns FAIL with error 'type_mismatch: age expected integer'. - Given a payload with 'blood_pressure_systolic' = 300, the system returns FAIL with error 'range_violation: blood_pressure_systolic must be between 60 and 250'. - Given a fully valid payload, the system returns PASS with empty validation_errors array. - All validation logs are written to a rotating file with daily rotation and 30-day retention. Output Contract: - format: JSON - fields: record_id: string (UUID); validation_status: string (PASS or FAIL); validation_errors: array of objects with fields: rule_id (string), field (string), expected (string), actual (string); normalized_payload: object (validated and type-coerced fields only if PASS, else null); timestamp: string (ISO 8601) - example: record_id: a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890; validation_status: FAIL; validation_errors: rule_id: R001; field: patient_id; expected: required; actual: missing; normalized_payload: None; timestamp: 2025-04-10T14:30:00Z
